items.title: Complete formal packet review
items.next_action: Use /app/review-packets to work packet batches and log review decisions.

items.title: Apply only reviewed canonical changes
items.reason: Packets prepare review but do not change canonical rule-unit data.
items.next_action: Apply only reviewed remove or replace decisions through the guarded apply path.

items.title: Define production reliance policy
items.reason: Review packets preserve boundaries but do not decide who may approve reliance.
items.next_action: Define reviewer roles, approval criteria, and external-use limits.
